contract_sla.name: Employee Lifecycle - Manager Approval SLA
contract_sla.description: SLA to ensure manager approvals are completed within 3 business days of submission. Escalation triggers if approval is not received within 2 business days.

breach_action.name: Escalate Manager Approval to HR

contract_sla.name: Employee Lifecycle - IT Task Completion SLA
contract_sla.description: SLA ensuring IT provisioning tasks are completed within 1 business day for new onboarding requests and 2 business days for offboarding.

contract_sla.name: Employee Lifecycle - HR Task Completion SLA
contract_sla.description: SLA ensuring HR tasks (documentation, payroll, records) are completed within 3 business days of manager approval.

contract_sla.name: Employee Lifecycle - End-to-End Process Completion SLA
contract_sla.description: Overall SLA tracking end-to-end employee lifecycle process completion. Onboarding/offboarding should be fully completed within 5 business days of submission.

breach_action.name: Escalate Overdue Lifecycle Process
